hero.title: We Help You Digitalize & Establish Your Company
hero.lead: Revo Creative is the digital partner for SMEs, corporations, and government. We deliver websites, apps, branding, and digital marketing that are high-quality yet affordable for all.

services.title: Complete Digital Services for Your Business
services.subtitle: From idea to launch — we handle your entire digitalization journey with corporate quality, yet flexible enough for SME scale.
services.s1Desc: Company profile, directory, portal, and custom web apps with fast performance and SEO-friendly architecture.
services.s2Desc: Internal apps, CRM, attendance systems, dashboards, and mini-apps ready to serve thousands of users.
services.s3Desc: Logo, visual identity, and brand guidelines that reflect the unique value of your company.
services.s4Desc: Content strategy, social media, and paid advertising to increase visibility and conversions.

productsHome.title: Flagship Digital Products Ready to Customize
productsHome.subtitle: We offer flagship digital products that can be customized to your business and organization needs — ready-to-use, flexible, and integrated.
productsHome.p1Desc: An elegant company profile website with a Content Management System for self-service updates.
productsHome.p2Desc: Enterprise Resource Planning system for finance, inventory, and operations.
productsHome.p3Desc: Employee attendance app with geo-tagging, photo verification, and automatic reporting.
productsHome.p4Desc: Membership management for organizations & communities — registration, verification, and dues.

process.title: How We Work With You
process.intro: A structured process ensures every project ships on time, fits the brief, and delivers real impact.
process.s1Desc: Deeply understand your business goals, target users, and project expectations.
process.s2Desc: Build wireframes and visual designs that are user-friendly and on-brand.
process.s3Desc: Technical implementation with modern tech, integrated with your existing systems.
process.s4Desc: Product launch plus ongoing technical support to keep operations stable.

clients.title: Trusted by Leading Brands
clients.subtitle: From ministries and corporations to SMEs — we're proud to be part of their digital journey.

ctaHome.subtitle: Consult your business digitalization needs with us — free, no commitment.

productsPage.title: Flagship Digital Products
productsPage.subtitle: Four flagship digital products, ready to use and customizable to your business or organization needs — from company profile to internal corporate systems.
productsPage.p1Desc: A professional company profile website equipped with a Content Management System so your team can update content — news, products, services, and team pages — independently without touching code.
productsPage.p1F1: Elegant & responsive design on every device
productsPage.p1F2: Intuitive CMS dashboard for non-technical admins
productsPage.p1F3: News module, dynamic pages, & media gallery
productsPage.p1F4: Built-in SEO optimization and Google Analytics integration
productsPage.p1F5: Multi-language & multi-user with tiered access rights
productsPage.p2Desc: An Enterprise Resource Planning system that integrates every business process into one platform — finance, inventory, purchasing, sales, and HR. Suitable for scaling SMEs or mid-sized companies standardizing operations.
productsPage.p2F1: Integrated Finance, Inventory, Sales, & Purchasing modules
productsPage.p2F5: Layered role & permission for safe audits
productsPage.p3Desc: A modern attendance app replacing traditional fingerprint machines — employees can check-in/check-out from their smartphones with geo-location and photo verification, while HR gets real-time reports.
productsPage.p3F5: HR dashboard with team attendance analytics
productsPage.p4Desc: An integrated membership management platform for professional organizations, communities, associations, and foundations — from new member registration and data verification to dues management and digital member cards.
productsPage.p4F2: Complete member profile with digital member card
productsPage.ctaTitle: Interested in customizing one of our products?
productsPage.ctaSubtitle: Every product can be modified to fit your unique business needs — consult with our team for free.

portfolioPage.title: Impactful Work
portfolioPage.subtitle: From ministries and state-owned enterprises to SMEs — here is a selection of digital projects we've delivered with our partners.
portfolioPage.pf1Desc: A company profile landing page promoting copra (coconut) export products from across Indonesia — helping Tawsen Trade reach international buyers with a professional brand presence.
portfolioPage.pf2Desc: Rebuilt ISI's company profile website complete with a Content Management System integrated with the membership system and organizational event calendar.
portfolioPage.pf3Desc: Built ITT's company profile website with a Content Management System to manage company information and product catalog independently.
portfolioPage.pf4Desc: Rebuilt E-Manufaktur's company profile plus technical support to build software that processes the Inquiry-to-Quotation flow, integrated with warehouse system.
portfolioPage.pf5Desc: An educational and halal-product directory website accessible to the public. Helped BPJPH carry out its digital outreach mandate and made it easier for SMEs to understand halal certification.
portfolioPage.pf6Desc: An integrated learning hub for BPJPH with videos, articles, and quizzes — offering digital certification for participants who complete the course.
portfolioPage.pf7Desc: A comprehensive company profile serving as a central information hub — elevating Elitery's brand and credibility as a Google Cloud MSP.
portfolioPage.pf8Desc: A main hub for the foundation — presenting initiatives, impact reports, and transparency that attract stakeholder support.
portfolioPage.pf9Desc: HRM and attendance monitoring system that automates attendance tracking and improves operational efficiency of HR management.
portfolioPage.pf10Desc: A flight-search Mini App for MyTelkomsel — letting users find flight details and save favorite routes within the app ecosystem.
portfolioPage.pf11Desc: A 360° dashboard for the by.U CRM that consolidates customer data — interaction history, purchases, and support tickets — in one unified view.
portfolioPage.pf12Desc: Real-time fuel management dashboard integrated with PLN SIMBAKAR — monitoring stock, consumption, and usage trends across power plants.
portfolioPage.pf13Desc: A digital platform helping users access religious content and services in a structured and easy-to-use way.
portfolioPage.ctaTitle: Have a project you'd like to digitalize?
portfolioPage.ctaSubtitle: Join the list of clients who have trusted their digital transformation to us.

aboutPage.title: Meet Revo Creative
aboutPage.subtitle: Starting from the spirit of 2023, we've built partnerships with young talents in IT, business, and administration to support impactful digital quality.
aboutPage.storyTitle: Why Collaboration with Revo Creative is Different?
aboutPage.storyP1: Since 2023, Revo Creative has helped businesses and government agencies digitalize their operations. We've also built partnerships with young IT talents to support the quality of service we deliver.
aboutPage.storyP2: Our mission is to deliver positive impact — both in branding and economically — through digitalization. To this end, we offer high-quality yet affordable digital services and products for all.
aboutPage.valuesSubtitle: The core values that shape how we work with every partner — from the first brief to project launch.
aboutPage.valueDDesc: Delivering the highest quality at a price that remains affordable for everyone.
aboutPage.valueADesc: Keeping up with the latest technology so the solutions we build stay relevant.
aboutPage.valueWDesc: Working seriously with high dedication while maintaining creativity and balance.
aboutPage.valueEDesc: Supporting every team member and client to grow together within the digital ecosystem.
aboutPage.whySubtitle: Three main reasons our partners keep trusting us with their digital transformation.
aboutPage.why1Desc: We believe digitalization isn't just for large corporations — corporate quality should be accessible to SMEs and any institution.
aboutPage.why2Desc: Engineering, business, marketing, and administration in one team — so your project is considered holistically, not just technically.
aboutPage.why3Desc: From ministries and state-owned enterprises to SMEs — we've proven our ability to adapt across scales and industries.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Ready to become our next digital partner?
aboutPage.ctaSubtitle: Discuss your ideas and needs with our team — we're ready to listen.

contactPage.introDesc: We believe the best digital projects start with a good conversation. Feel free to share ideas, needs, or even small questions — our team is ready to guide you from zero to launch.
